shadow_event.query: 需要； 我希望是直接在这个窗口来测试，可以么？

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…
那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；
可以，建议你分成两层测：`VS Code 手工验收` + `仓库脚本回放`。这样能同时回答两件事：一是“真实使用时 context 会不会被控制住”，二是“GC 的选择是不是符合设计”。 **先看什么** 每次都盯这几个信号就够了：
需要； 我希望是直接在这个窗口来测试，可以么？

decision.archive_summary: Earlier status-check about why context data looked wrong and whether GC now runs every turn was answered: new chats with too few turns hit the minTurns threshold and may not GC yet. The active topic is now how to test GC behavior directly in this same window for the UMC project, especially designing a live conversation flow that makes GC choices visible and reduces context size across continuous chat and topic switches.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn stays on the same active topic as t4-t5: designing and running an in-window GC test. Those turns should remain raw because the next response depends on that active testing plan. The earlier turns t1-t3 are resolved background diagnosis/status and are no longer needed to answer the current request, so they are good eviction candidates. No durable preference or rule from those turns needs pinning.
